description:
The Aerobridge fleet management system is being prepared for production deployment. As part of security compliance, you must change the admin user's password.

Change the password of the 'admin' user account from the current password 'adminpass123' to the new password 'SecureDrone2024!' using the Django admin interface.

Steps:
1. If not logged in, log in to the Django admin at http://localhost:8000/admin/ with username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'
2. Navigate to the 'Users' section under 'Authentication and Authorization'
3. Click on the 'admin' user
4. On the user edit page, find and click the password change link (near the password field area)
5. Enter the new password 'SecureDrone2024!' in both password fields
6. Click 'Change password' to save

The new password must be exactly: SecureDrone2024!
